# Blanket disallow with carved-out subpaths (typical AEM-style shape).
User-agent: *

Disallow: /content/

# Carved-out asset directories
Allow: /content/dam/assets/corporate/
Allow: /content/dam/assets/pricelists/
Allow: /content/dam/assets/categories/
Allow: /content/dam/assets/marketplace/

# Technical pages
Disallow: /errorpages/
Disallow: /maintenance/

Sitemap: https://www.example.com/sitemap.xml
